PING_DESC: All sub-systems are currently operating with the following latency:
ABOUT_DESC:
Hello! My name is **Naura Hoshino**! I am a next-generation virtual assistant created by **Developer Aryan** to bring your Discord community to life.

Unlike ordinary bots, I have a fully comprehensive ecosystem:

**🤖 Advanced Artificial Intelligence**
Powered by Google Gemini, I can chat just like a real human and remember conversational context.

**🎶 Premium Audio System**
Using the *Lavalink Engine*, I play songs in crystal clear quality without lag.

**💰 RPG Economy & Minigames**
An economy system with rotating shops, inventory, fishing, car racing, and even bank robberies.

**🎙️ Temp Voice Management**
Automatic private voice room creation with a dedicated control panel (Lock, Hide, Stage Mode, etc).

**🛡️ Protection & Moderation**
Anti-Nuke systems, Automod, and smart filters to keep your server safe.

Don't hesitate to call me anytime! ✨
HELP_DESC: Welcome to Naura's guidebook! Please select a module category you want to explore through the *dropdown* menu below.
HELP_FOOTER: Type commands to see further options.
HELP_CONTENT_CORE:
Basic commands to find out bot info.

`/core ping` | `n!ping` - Check machine latency.
`/core stats` | `n!stats` - Check server specs.
`/core about` | `n!about` - Developer info.
`/core language` | `n!language` - Change bot language.
`/snipe` | `n!snipe` - View recently deleted messages.
HELP_CONTENT_ECO:
Accumulate wealth and conquer the leaderboards!

`/economy balance` | `n!balance` - Check money balance.
`/economy daily/weekly` | `n!daily / n!weekly` - Claim salary.
`/economy work` | `n!work` - Work to earn money.
`/economy shop/inventory` | `n!shop / n!inventory` - Buy exclusive items.
`/economy rob/steal` | `n!rob / n!steal` - Rob other members' money.
HELP_CONTENT_MUSIC:
Play your favorite songs with high quality.

`/music play` | `n!play` - Play songs/playlists.
`/music skip` | `n!skip` - Skip a song.
`/music stop` | `n!stop` - Stop the music.
`/music queue` | `n!queue` - View song queue.
HELP_CONTENT_GAME:
Spend time with other members.

`/minigame tictactoe` | `n!ttt` - Play TTT with friends.
`/minigame rps` | `n!rps` - Play Rock Paper Scissors.
`/rank` | `n!rank` - Check your current XP level.
`/ai` | `n!ai` - Chat with Naura (AI).
HELP_CONTENT_ADMIN:
Special tools to secure the server.

`/setup-ticket` | `n!setup-ticket` - Create a ticket service panel.
`/setup-modmail` | `n!setup-modmail` - Enable Modmail reception.
`/setup-tempvoice` | `n!setup-tempvoice` - Create interactive Voice Channels.
`/setup-channels` | `n!setup-channels` - Isolate AI & Leveling features.
HELP_ERR_NOT_YOURS: ❌ This menu is not yours. Please type `/core help` yourself.
